channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Starmer slams Fifa over ‘unacceptable’ World Cup ticket prices as he urges action to stop fans being ‘ripped off’
item.description: Starmer slams Fifa over ‘unacceptable’ World Cup ticket prices as he urges action to stop fans being ‘ripped off’

item.title: The Times: Andy Burnham would rip up asylum hotel contracts if he were PM - The Times
item.description: Andy Burnham would rip up asylum hotel contracts if he were PM - The Times

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham allies urge him to make Louise Haigh chancellor - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham allies urge him to make Louise Haigh chancellor - The Telegraph

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I hadn’t realised Andy Burnham had done a Tik Tok about not building on fields. He is mayor of Makerfield and his own policy prescribes building on fields, because it isn’t possible to hit housing targets any other way
item.description: I hadn’t realised Andy Burnham had done a Tik Tok about not building on fields. He is mayor of Makerfield and his own policy prescribes building on fields, because it isn’t possible to hit housing targets any other way

item.title: FT UK Politics: Embarrassing messages about Keir Starmer to be exposed in Mandelson files
item.description: Embarrassing messages about Keir Starmer to be exposed in Mandelson files

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour faces union backlash after minister says living wage extension to over-18s not certain before election – as it happened
item.description: Labour faces union backlash after minister says living wage extension to over-18s not certain before election – as it happened

item.title: The Guardian: Should Keir Starmer follow Mikel Arteta’s leadership method? | Letters - The Guardian
item.description: Should Keir Starmer follow Mikel Arteta’s leadership method? | Letters - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): The less we hear from Tony Blair, the better | Letters
item.description: The less we hear from Tony Blair, the better | Letters

item.title: i Politics: Burnham as PM would not beat Farage in a general election, poll shows
item.description: Burnham as PM would not beat Farage in a general election, poll shows
